Tidy Tuesday Animal Rescues

Setup

Registered S3 method overwritten by 'htmlwidgets':
  method           from         
  print.htmlwidget tools:rstudio

EDA

Objective: Make a nice plot in under two hours from an unfamiliar dataset.

Approach one - using borough name


# Clean data and create spatial object from point information
tidy_animal_rescues <- animal_rescues %>% 
  filter(incident_notional_cost != "NULL") %>% 
  mutate(
    stn_ground_name = parse_factor(stn_ground_name), # make factor
    ward = parse_factor(ward),
    date_time_of_call = dmy_hms(date_time_of_call),
    animal = parse_factor(animal_group_parent),
    incident_notional_cost = parse_number(incident_notional_cost),
    pump_hours_total = parse_number(pump_hours_total)
  ) %>% 
  filter(borough == "Tower Hamlets") %>% 
  st_as_sf(coords = c("easting_rounded", "northing_rounded"), crs = 27700)


# Get outline of Tower Hamlets
tower_hamlets_map <- getbb("London Borough of Tower Hamlets") %>% 
  opq(timeout = 25*100) %>% 
  add_osm_feature(
    key = "admin_level", 
    value = "8"
  ) %>%
  osmdata_sf() %$% 
  osm_multipolygons %>% 
  filter(name == "London Borough of Tower Hamlets") %>% 
  st_transform(27700)

Simple figure


png("test.png")
tidy_animal_rescues %>% 
  select(animal, final_description, street, ward, geometry) %>%
  ggplot() +
    geom_sf(data = tower_hamlets_map) +
    geom_sf(data = tidy_animal_rescues, aes(color = fct_infreq(animal), size = incident_notional_cost))
  dev.off()
null device 
          1 

tower_hamlet_roads <- getbb("London Borough of Tower Hamlets") %>% 
  opq(timeout = 25*100) %>% 
  add_osm_feature(
    key = "highway", 
    value = c("trunk","primary", "secondary", "tertiary")
  ) %>%
  osmdata_sf() %$% 
  osm_lines %>%
  st_transform(27700) %>%
  st_intersection(tower_hamlets_map)
Warning: attribute variables are assumed to be spatially constant throughout all geometries

tower_hamlets_water <- getbb("London Borough of Tower Hamlets") %>% 
  opq(timeout = 25*100) %>% 
  add_osm_feature(
    key = "natural", 
    value = "water"
  ) %>%
  osmdata_sf() %$% 
  osm_multipolygons %>% 
#  filter(name == "London Borough of Tower Hamlets") %>% 
  st_transform(27700) %>% 
  st_intersection(tower_hamlets_map)
Error in curl::curl_fetch_memory(url, handle = handle): Error in the HTTP2 framing layer
Request failed [ERROR]. Retrying in 1 seconds...
Warning: attribute variables are assumed to be spatially constant throughout all geometries

tidy_animal_rescues %>% 
  select(animal, final_description, street, ward, geometry) %>%
  ggplot() +
    geom_sf(data = tower_hamlets_map, fill = NA) +
    geom_sf(data = tower_hamlet_roads, fill = "grey") +
    geom_sf(data = tower_hamlets_water, fill = "lightblue") +
    geom_sf(data = tidy_animal_rescues, aes(color = fct_infreq(animal), size = incident_notional_cost))


```r

st_crs(tower_hamlets_map$geometry)
st_crs(tidy_animal_rescues$geometry)

```r
tidy_animal_rescues %>% 
  filter(animal == \Deer\)

<!-- rnb-text-begin -->



## Aproach two - using geocoded information

### Get broader Tower Hamlets


<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuYGBgclxudG93ZXJfaGFtbGV0c19tYXBfd2lkZSA8LSBnZXRiYihcXExvbmRvbiBCb3JvdWdoIG9mIFRvd2VyIEhhbWxldHNcXCkgJT4lIFxuICBvcHEodGltZW91dCA9IDI1KjEwMCkgJT4lIFxuICBhZGRfb3NtX2ZlYXR1cmUoXG4gICAga2V5ID0gXFxhZG1pbl9sZXZlbFxcLCBcbiAgICB2YWx1ZSA9IFxcOFxcXG4gICkgJT4lXG4gIG9zbWRhdGFfc2YoKSAlJCUgXG4gIG9zbV9tdWx0aXBvbHlnb25zICU+JVxuICBzdF90cmFuc2Zvcm0oMjc3MDApICU+JSBcbiAgZ2dwbG90KCkgK1xuICAgIGdlb21fc2YoZGF0YSA9IC4pXG5cbmBgYFxuYGBgIn0= -->

```r
```r
tower_hamlets_map_wide <- getbb(\London Borough of Tower Hamlets\) %>% 
  opq(timeout = 25*100) %>% 
  add_osm_feature(
    key = \admin_level\, 
    value = \8\
  ) %>%
  osmdata_sf() %$% 
  osm_multipolygons %>%
  st_transform(27700) %>% 
  ggplot() +
    geom_sf(data = .)


<!-- rnb-source-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiUmVxdWVzdCBmYWlsZWQgWzUwNF0uIFJldHJ5aW5nIGluIDEgc2Vjb25kcy4uLlxuUmVxdWVzdCBmYWlsZWQgWzUwNF0uIFJldHJ5aW5nIGluIDMuNiBzZWNvbmRzLi4uXG5FcnJvciBpbiBjaGVja19mb3JfZXJyb3IoZG9jKSA6IEdlbmVyYWwgb3ZlcnBhc3Mgc2VydmVyIGVycm9yOyByZXR1cm5lZDpcbk9TTTNTIFJlc3BvbnNlVGhlIGRhdGEgaW5jbHVkZWQgaW4gdGhpcyBkb2N1bWVudCBpcyBmcm9tIHd3dy5vcGVuc3RyZWV0bWFwLm9yZy4gVGhlIGRhdGEgaXMgbWFkZSBhdmFpbGFibGUgdW5kZXIgT0RiTC5FcnJvcjogcnVudGltZSBlcnJvcjogb3BlbjY0OiAwIFN1Y2Nlc3MgL29zbTNzX3YwLjcuNTVfb3NtX2Jhc2UgRGlzcGF0Y2hlcl9DbGllbnQ6OnJlcXVlc3RfcmVhZF9hbmRfaWR4Ojp0aW1lb3V0LiBUaGUgc2VydmVyIGlzIHByb2JhYmx5IHRvbyBidXN5IHRvIGhhbmRsZSB5b3VyIHJlcXVlc3QuIFxuIn0= -->

Request failed [504]. Retrying in 1 seconds… Request failed [504]. Retrying in 3.6 seconds… Error in check_for_error(doc) : General overpass server error; returned: OSM3S ResponseThe data included in this document is from www.openstreetmap.org. The data is made available under ODbL.Error: runtime error: open64: 0 Success /osm3s_v0.7.55_osm_base Dispatcher_Client::request_read_and_idx::timeout. The server is probably too busy to handle your request.




<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-text-begin -->


### Get fire station locations


<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuYGBgclxuc3RfaXNfbG9uZ2xhdChmaXJlX3N0YXRpb25zKVxuXG5gYGBcbmBgYCJ9 -->

```r
```r
st_is_longlat(fire_stations)


<!-- rnb-source-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiWzFdIEZBTFNFXG4ifQ== -->

[1] FALSE




<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-text-begin -->



<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuYGBgclxuZ2dwbG90KCkgK1xuICBnZW9tX3NmKGRhdGEgPSB0b3dlcl9oYW1sZXRzX21hcCwgZmlsbCA9IE5BKSArXG4gIGdlb21fc2YoZGF0YSA9IHRvd2VyX2hhbWxldF9yb2FkcywgYWxwaGEgPSAwLjMpICtcbiAgZ2VvbV9zZihkYXRhID0gZmlyZV9zdGF0aW9ucywgY29sb3IgPSBcXGJsYWNrXFwsIHNpemUgPSAzLCBzaGFwZSA9IDI0KSArXG4gIGdlb21fc2YoZGF0YSA9IHRpZHlfYW5pbWFsX3Jlc2N1ZXMsIGFlcyhjb2xvdXIgPSBzdG5fZ3JvdW5kX25hbWUsIHNpemUgPSBwdW1wX2hvdXJzX3RvdGFsKSwgYWxwaGEgPSAwLjYpICtcbiAgbGFicyh0aXRsZSA9IFxcQW5pbWFsIFJlc2N1ZXMgaW4gTG9uZG9uIEJvcm91Z2ggb2YgVG93ZXIgSGFtbGV0c1xcKSArXG4gIHNjYWxlX3lfY29udGludW91cyhicmVha3MgPSA1MS41MCkgK1xuICBzY2FsZV94X2NvbnRpbnVvdXMoYnJlYWtzID0gMCkgK1xuICB0aGVtZShcbiAgICAgIHBhbmVsLmdyaWQubWFqb3IgPSBlbGVtZW50X2xpbmUoY29sb3IgPSBcXGdyYXlcXCwgc2l6ZSA9IDAuMSlcbiAgKVxuYGBgXG5gYGAifQ== -->

```r
```r
ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = tower_hamlets_map, fill = NA) +
  geom_sf(data = tower_hamlet_roads, alpha = 0.3) +
  geom_sf(data = fire_stations, color = \black\, size = 3, shape = 24) +
  geom_sf(data = tidy_animal_rescues, aes(colour = stn_ground_name, size = pump_hours_total), alpha = 0.6) +
  labs(title = \Animal Rescues in London Borough of Tower Hamlets\) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = 51.50) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 0) +
  theme(
      panel.grid.major = element_line(color = \gray\, size = 0.1)
  )

```

Approach three - a network analysis of the stations and jobs

References

https://data.london.gov.uk/download/statistical-gis-boundary-files-london/9ba8c833-6370-4b11-abdc-314aa020d5e0/statistical-gis-boundaries-london.zip

Mock, Thomas. 2021. “Tidy Tuesday: A Weekly Data Project Aimed at the r Ecosystem.” https://github.com/rfordatascience/tidytuesday.
R Core Team. 2019. R: A Language and Environment for Statistical Computing. Vienna, Austria: R Foundation for Statistical Computing. https://www.R-project.org.
